# Complex Page

A page demonstrating all supported Confluence storage format elements.

## Code Blocks

Here is a Go code example:

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
	fmt.Println("Hello, Confluence!")
}
```

A plain code block with no language:

```
plain text
no language here
```
